changes: Rebuild the packaged Joystick Scroller DLL as fa_ui_scroller.0.0.10.dll and stage it under Custom/Plugins instead of Custom/Scripts inside the .var.
Keep the compile-time generated catalog seam so the plugin runtime does not depend on the old resource-loading catalog path.
Advance the package-first dev test lane to FrameAngel.JoystickScrollerDev.4.var so VaM sees a fresh outer package identity too.
